title: stachys germanica var. huetii
intro: Stachys germanica var. huetii, also known as Lamb's Ears or Hedgehog Germander, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is also valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Stachys germanica var. huetii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
